'''koshajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eyewatering|eyewatering]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-sh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eyewatering|eyewatering]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| koshajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:koshajithi|koshajithi]] || [[word:koshajiji|koshajiji]] || [[word:koshajishi|koshajishi]] || [[word:koshajiki|koshajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:koshajuthuthu|koshajuthuthu]] || [[word:koshajujuju|koshajujuju]] || [[word:koshajushushu|koshajushushu]] || [[word:koshajukuku|koshajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:koshajuthu|koshajuthu]] || [[word:koshajuju|koshajuju]] || [[word:koshajushu|koshajushu]] || [[word:koshajuku|koshajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:koshajufthuf|koshajufthuf]] || [[word:koshajufjuf|koshajufjuf]] || [[word:koshajufshuf|koshajufshuf]] || [[word:koshajufkuf|koshajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:koshajethe|koshajethe]] || [[word:koshajeje|koshajeje]] || [[word:koshajeshe|koshajeshe]] || [[word:koshajeke|koshajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:koshajothotho|koshajothotho]] || [[word:koshajojojo|koshajojojo]] || [[word:koshajoshosho|koshajoshosho]] || [[word:koshajokoko|koshajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:koshajotho|koshajotho]] || [[word:koshajojo|koshajojo]] || [[word:koshajosho|koshajosho]] || [[word:koshajoko|koshajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:koshajofthof|koshajofthof]] || [[word:koshajofjof|koshajofjof]] || [[word:koshajofshof|koshajofshof]] || [[word:koshajofkof|koshajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:koshajïfthïf|koshajïfthïf]] || [[word:koshajïfjïf|koshajïfjïf]] || [[word:koshajïfshïf|koshajïfshïf]] || [[word:koshajïfkïf|koshajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:koshajïfthïfthïf|koshajïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:koshajïfjïfjïf|koshajïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:koshajïfshïfshïf|koshajïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:koshajïfkïfkïf|koshajïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:koshajïfthïf|koshajïfthïf]] || [[word:koshajïfjïf|koshajïfjïf]] || [[word:koshajïfshïf|koshajïfshïf]] || [[word:koshajïfkïf|koshajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:koshajïfthïf|koshajïfthïf]] || [[word:koshajïfjïf|koshajïfjïf]] || [[word:koshajïfshïf|koshajïfshïf]] || [[word:koshajïfkïf|koshajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:koshajæthæ|koshajæthæ]] || [[word:koshajæjæ|koshajæjæ]] || [[word:koshajæshæ|koshajæshæ]] || [[word:koshajækæ|koshajækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:koshajathatha|koshajathatha]] || [[word:koshajajaja|koshajajaja]] || [[word:koshajashasha|koshajashasha]] || [[word:koshajakaka|koshajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:koshajatha|koshajatha]] || [[word:koshajaja|koshajaja]] || [[word:koshajasha|koshajasha]] || [[word:koshajaka|koshajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:koshajafthaf|koshajafthaf]] || [[word:koshajafjaf|koshajafjaf]] || [[word:koshajafshaf|koshajafshaf]] || [[word:koshajafkaf|koshajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:koshajasha|koshajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:koshajshësha|koshajshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koshajrosha|koshajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:koshajmusha|koshajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:koshajyasha|koshajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokoshajnkshësha|gokoshajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokoshajnkrosha|gokoshajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokoshajnkmusha|gokoshajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokoshajnkyasha|gokoshajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:koshashajasha|koshashajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:koshashajshësha|koshashajshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koshashajrosha|koshashajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:koshashajmusha|koshashajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:koshashajyasha|koshashajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokoshashajnkshësha|gokoshashajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokoshashajnkrosha|gokoshashajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokoshashajnkmusha|gokoshashajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokoshashajnkyasha|gokoshashajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:keshæjasha|keshæjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:keshæjshësha|keshæjshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:keshæjrosha|keshæjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:keshæjmusha|keshæjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:keshæjyasha|keshæjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokeshæjnkshësha|gokeshæjnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokeshæjnkrosha|gokeshæjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokeshæjnkmusha|gokeshæjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokeshæjnkyasha|gokeshæjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:koshfajasha|koshfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:koshfajshësha|koshfajshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koshfajrosha|koshfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:koshfajmusha|koshfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:koshfajyasha|koshfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokoshfajnkshësha|gokoshfajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokoshfajnkrosha|gokoshfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokoshfajnkmusha|gokoshfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokoshfajnkyasha|gokoshfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
